title: Staff: Deshun Li
display_label: Deshun Li — Research Budget Development Specialist
staff_title: Research Budget Development Specialist, Office of Research Administration
content:
Mrs. Deshun Li is the Research Budget Development Specialist, Office of Research Administration.

Office: Tyler Hall, Suite 304. Phone: 443-885-3309. Email: deshun.li@morgan.edu.

Mrs. Deshun Li serves as Research Budget Development Specialist with over 10 years of experience in finance management and investment planning.

She joined Morgan State University in 2018 in the Office of Sponsored Programs — now the Office of Research Administration — under the leadership of Dr. Mildred Ofosu.

Ms. Li works with Principal Investigators (PIs) to develop budget proposals and budget justifications. Final budget approval covers compliance with federal agency and university fiscal policies, correctness of direct cost, salaries, committed effort, release time, fringe benefit, and indirect cost calculations, plus checking completion of Internal Routing Forms by all PIs. She is available to help PIs revise the budget and budget justification before award. She is also responsible for entering the final proposed and awarded budget into Banner.

Before joining Morgan State, Ms. Li worked as a financial advisor while raising her three sons. She previously also worked as a nurse in China.

Education: BS in Quantitative Business Analysis; BS in Health Information Management.
